transcription.text: What is the mystery of bus 509? Why are these three people on it? A businessman, a middle-aged woman, and the man who keeps his eyes closed. Mystery? There's really no mystery. Listen, on a 200-mile trip like this, the bus gives me a chance to work. No car to park, either. I'm visiting my children. It's so safe and comfortable to go by Greyhound. I'm a lazy kind of guy. I like to just sit back, relax, and grab a nap. There's no mystery about why people go Greyhound. Remember... Relaxing while we're riding in a Greyhound bus. We're seeing all the scenery in Comfort Plus. It's such a comfort to take the bus. And leave the driving to us in a Greyhound bus. Lucky us in a Greyhound bus.
